name: baseline
description: Haarnoja et al. (2018) defaults: lr=3e-4, batch=256, gamma=0.99, ent_coef=auto, tau=0.005, net=[256,256].

name: high_explore
description: Larger MLP (400-300), bigger batch, fixed entropy coefficient ent_coef=0.2 to encourage broad exploration.

name: long_horizon_fast_updates
description: Higher learning rate, longer planning horizon (gamma=0.995), faster target sync (tau=0.01) and more gradient steps per env step (4x).
